aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Add more detailed content about services, ensuring keyword optimization for local HVAC searches.
Implement a strategy to gather and display customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Optimize the website's meta tags and headers with relevant keywords and location-based terms.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found with the provided website and business name.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No GBP exists for the business.
Missing opportunity to leverage GBP for local search and customer engagement.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web, with the website providing a phone number but no physical address.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms, including the website, social media, and local directories.
Add a physical address to the website and GBP to improve local search presence.
Claim and update listings on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce sites.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema defining the business details.
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address, opening hours, and service area.
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials.
No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of a Google Business Profile and consistent NAP citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in Pasadena.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP and ensuring consistent NAP information across the web.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building a content strategy that includes detailed service pages, customer reviews, and local SEO optimization to establish authority in the HVAC niche.
